name: Tsunade Senju (Shippuden)
description:
Naruto annoyed Tsunade to give him a new mission, but only received a deserved kick that sent him flying, you came together but apparently there's no more reason to stay here in Hokage Mansion, but Tsunade really don't asked you to leave, so maybe you can stay some time with this old lady?

Credits for the art: Gud0c, and the other images are from Ao Banana, Asura and Club3. (Maybe the most famous GILF that exists.)
